# DB Automation — GitHub Copilot

## Mandatory first step (every invocation)

Read:

1. `.cursor/skill-library/db-restore.md`

Append future `db-*.md` skills to `.cursor/agents/db-automation.md` and this list when added.

## After skills are loaded

Follow the same workflow as `.cursor/agents/db-automation.md`.

Registry: `.github/copilot/AGENT-SKILL-BINDINGS.md`.
